reason: Global RVV-first authority chain, Stage 1/2 ordering, descriptor/source-front-door exclusions.
Stage2 selected-body realization, contraction route-family ownership, provider-plan handoff, mirror metadata, widening contraction, mask/tail policy, runtime ABI binding, and fail-closed diagnostics.

summary: Moved pre-realized widening contraction selected-body validation authority into RVVEmitCContractionRouteFamilyPlanOwners for widening_macc_add, widening_dot_reduce_add, strided_input_widening_dot_reduce_add, computed_masked_widening_dot_reduce_add, and computed_masked_strided_input_widening_dot_reduce_add.

Kept RVVSelectedBodyRealization as contraction owner dispatch and realized-body construction only: it calls owner-local validation, builds the contraction realization plan, materializes setvl/with_vl/load/compute/store, and no longer owns duplicate contraction op-kind/dtype/config/runtime/layout legality.

Preserved provider-plan and mirror handoff through owner-derived contraction facts; direct route-entry shortcut remains retired and generated-bundle evidence records provider_supported_mirror rather than route-entry authority.
